summary: Generated and curated a NYPL Digital Collections CLI with story discovery, plan execution, workspaces, and dossier workflows.

novel_features.name: Story discovery plans
novel_features.description: Expand a seed person or topic into NYPL-friendly narrative clusters, related characters, and archive search queries.

novel_features.name: Research plan execution
novel_features.description: Execute or preview story discovery plans against NYPL item search with public-domain filtering and bounded per-query limits.

novel_features.name: Local research workspaces
novel_features.description: Save search runs and deduped evidence items into local reusable research workspaces.

novel_features.name: Story dossiers
novel_features.description: Emit Markdown or JSON research dossiers combining narrative clusters, related figures, search prompts, and ranked item candidates.
